summary: ANDROID | Log In - When user is Logged out button does not work but user is Logged out
scenario: Log Out button in Account tab does not update to Log In after logout, requiring re-entering the tab to see the change
description_clean: When a user taps the Log Out button in the app, the button does not appear to work (no action observed). However, if the user re-enters the Account tab, they are actually logged out. This appears to be a UI-only issue where the Log Out button remains displayed instead of being replaced by a Log In button after logout.
steps: Observe that no immediate action appears to occur (button remains visible)
Navigate away from Account tab (e.g., go to Home tab)
expected: Tapping Log Out should immediately log the user out and replace the Log Out button with a Log In button on the Account screen.
actual: After tapping Log Out, no immediate action is observed; the Log Out button remains displayed. However, upon leaving and re-entering the Account tab, the user is actually logged out (Log In button is shown).
